inputs.titre: La translation des reliques de Saint-Martin à Tours, événement majeur renforçant le culte des saints et la christianisation de la Gaule

reason: The image depicts a plausible scene of the translation of relics, likely Saint Martin's, within a stone building in 461 AD. The architecture, clothing (togas and tunics), candles, pottery vessels, and incense are generally appropriate for the period. However, the lighting fixtures appear somewhat later in design than the 5th century, reducing the score. The hairstyle of a few people also look too modern. The presence of what appears to be a mass-produced uniform t-shirt in the crowd is anachronistic as well.
